hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_STDOUT" | grep -qiE '(ANDROID_HOME|JAVA_HOME|adb.*not found|device.*not found|no devices|daemon.*not running|accessibility.*not|emulator.*not|simulator.*not|xcode.*not|xcrun.*failed|simctl.*error|provisioning.*profile)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "AutoMobile error detected. Run /doctor to diagnose and fix the issue."}'; fi
